info.title: Docgen API
info.description: API for generating and customizing Word documents and converting them to PDFs.

post.description: Generates a customized document from a template URL and replacements.
Generates customized documents in parallel for a list of candidates from a SharePoint template.

get.description: Downloads the specified SharePoint template and extracts all placeholder fields. Use this endpoint to suggest the list of fields to the user.

parameters.name: template_name
parameters.description: The name of the template file in SharePoint to retrieve and extract placeholders from.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Customer Entra ID tenant ID for SharePoint routing.

parameters.name: site_url
parameters.description: SharePoint site or library URL passed from Copilot Studio knowledge to scope the document search to only that library.

template_url.description: Direct URL of the Word template file.

template_name.description: The name of the template file in SharePoint to retrieve and extract placeholders from.

tenant_id.description: Customer Entra ID tenant ID for SharePoint routing.

site_url.description: SharePoint site or library URL to scope template search.

template_url.description: Direct URL of the Word template file (e.g. from SharePoint/Teams).

template_name.description: The name of the template file in SharePoint to retrieve and customize.

tenant_id.description: Customer Entra ID tenant ID for SharePoint routing.

site_url.description: SharePoint site or library URL passed from Copilot Studio knowledge to scope the document search to only that library.

template_name.description: The name of the template file in SharePoint to retrieve and customize.

template_url.description: Direct URL of the Word template file.

global_replacements.description: Replacements applied globally to all candidates.

candidates.description: The list of candidates to customize documents for.

tenant_id.description: Customer Entra ID tenant ID for SharePoint routing.

site_url.description: SharePoint site or library URL passed from Copilot Studio knowledge to scope the document search to only that library.
